languages.text: "К сожалению, вынужден{mf||а} вам отказать — дела не терпят отлагательств".
"Unfortunately, I must decline — I have urgent matters to attend to."
languages.original_text: "К сожалению, вынужден{mf||а} вам отказать — дела не терпят отлагательств".

traits.locale_text: "Unfortunately, I must decline — I have urgent matters to attend to."
"Unfortunately, I must decline — I have urgent matters to attend to."
"Unfortunately, I must decline — I have urgent matters to attend to."

languages.text: «Por desgracia, debo rechazar su propuesta. Tengo asuntos urgentes que atender».
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, I must decline — I have urgent matters to attend to."

traits.locale_text: «Por desgracia, debo rechazar su propuesta. Tengo asuntos urgentes que atender».

languages.text: “很遗憾，我不得不拒绝——我还有紧急事务要处理。”
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, I must decline — I have urgent matters to attend to."

traits.locale_text: “很遗憾，我不得不拒绝——我还有紧急事务要处理。”

languages.text: « Malheureusement, je dois refuser votre invitation. Le devoir m'appelle ailleurs. »
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, I must decline — I have urgent matters to attend to."

traits.locale_text: « Malheureusement, je dois refuser votre invitation. Le devoir m'appelle ailleurs. »

languages.text: "Maalesef reddetmek zorundayım. İlgilenmem gereken acil meseleler var."
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, I must decline — I have urgent matters to attend to."

traits.locale_text: "Maalesef reddetmek zorundayım. İlgilenmem gereken acil meseleler var."

languages.text: "Ich muss leider ablehnen ... ich muss mich um dringende Angelegenheiten kümmern."
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, I must decline — I have urgent matters to attend to."

traits.locale_text: "Ich muss leider ablehnen ... ich muss mich um dringende Angelegenheiten kümmern."

languages.text: 「残念ながら、お断りさせていただきます。急な用事があるのです。」
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, I must decline — I have urgent matters to attend to."

traits.locale_text: 「残念ながら、お断りさせていただきます。急な用事があるのです。」
